name: nenu-consent-app
description: Nenu consent-at-share widget — an MCP App (portable across Claude & ChatGPT) that shows a field-level share / edit / decline card before any scoped brief leaves the vault.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && cross-env INPUT=consent-app.html vite build
scripts.start: concurrently "cross-env NODE_ENV=development INPUT=consent-app.html vite build --watch" "tsx watch main.ts"
